hero.label: Technical scaffold
hero.title: Start from the right foundation instead of jumping straight into the landing page.
hero.body: The repo now has a Next.js App Router shell, strict TypeScript, Tailwind foundation, next-intl, an Auth.js stub, a Prisma skeleton and domain folders to move into Auth -> Team -> Dashboard.

docs.label: Reference Set
docs.title: The docs are ready for domain-based coding
docs.body: Product strategy, schema, Prisma draft and API contracts already live in docs so the next coding phases can stay aligned.

Login.label: Auth Placeholder
Login.title: The login screen will be wired in the next step
Login.body: This scaffold phase only sets up the route, provider shell and i18n foundation. OTP, session flow and guards come with the real Auth module.
Login.placeholderBody: From here, the next move is Auth APIs, user creation, team creation and the first team dashboard.
